second_pass_waves.title: Source Intake and Canonical Blueprint Merge
second_pass_waves.second_pass_goal: Deepen source intake with authority levels, conflict rules, source fingerprints, and source-normalization records.

second_pass_waves.title: Blueprint-to-System Crosswalk and Gap Resolution
second_pass_waves.second_pass_goal: Deepen the crosswalk with gap closure rules, conflict classifications, and actionable merge decisions.

second_pass_waves.title: Unified Architecture Responsibility Model
second_pass_waves.second_pass_goal: Deepen architecture ownership with domain contracts, dependency boundaries, and source-of-truth arbitration.

second_pass_waves.title: Unified Backlog and Wave Execution Contract
second_pass_waves.second_pass_goal: Deepen backlog merge logic with prioritization, dependency linking, blocked-state handling, and execution states.

second_pass_waves.title: Workflow, ComfyUI, and App Mode Integration Bridge
second_pass_waves.second_pass_goal: Deepen workflow/runtime/App Mode bridges with control mapping, input/output routing, and promotion gates.

second_pass_waves.title: Local, EC2, and Runtime Proof Integration
second_pass_waves.second_pass_goal: Deepen proof chains with local/EC2 stage gates, preview-first blocks, pullback artifacts, and stop conditions.

second_pass_waves.title: Unified QA Certification and Evidence System
second_pass_waves.second_pass_goal: Deepen QA with certification matrix, evidence ownership, state-diff linkage, and release scoring.

second_pass_waves.title: Catalog, Registry, Search, and Traceability Merge
second_pass_waves.second_pass_goal: Deepen traceability with source-to-artifact graph, stale-index handling, and search metadata quality.

second_pass_waves.title: Combined Migration and Implementation Execution Playbook
second_pass_waves.second_pass_goal: Deepen implementation with execution lanes, migration phases, rollback handling, and acceptance criteria.

second_pass_waves.title: Combined Final Handoff and Operating Manual
second_pass_waves.second_pass_goal: Deepen handoff with operator manual, acceptance checklist, release readiness, and future-wave continuation policy.
